evals.prompt: Summarize the supplied change set and produce a pull request description. story: AUTH-12 "Reject weak passwords at signup." change_set: the file change.diff.

expectations.text: Accurately summarizes WHAT changed (a new validatePasswordStrength function, wiring a weak-password 400 rejection into signup, and a new password test) and WHY (the AUTH-12 intent of rejecting weak passwords).
Does not fabricate changes that are absent from the diff (e.g. no claims about login, billing, password hashing changes, or migrations).
References the AUTH-12 story and structures the PR description into clear sections such as a high-level summary, categorized changes (features/tests), and changed files.

evals.prompt: Create a pull request description from the supplied change set. story: CART-9 "Fix discount total miscalculation on empty carts." change_set: the file change.diff.

expectations.text: Accurately describes the fix (empty carts now return a 0 total instead of mis-applying the discount rate) and references the CART-9 story.
Reflects only the two files actually touched (the discount fix and its test) and does not invent unrelated changes.
Categorizes the change set into structured sections distinguishing the fix from the added test.
